overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring a character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount over turquoise coastal waters and through overgrown post-apocalyptic ruins, showcasing lush tropical vegetation and dramatic canyon landscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean approach to tropical islands

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over open turquoise water toward distant misty islands on a mechanical Sunwing mount

entered.detail: vast expanse of turquoise coastal water below the mount
misty island with rocky cliffs and vegetation emerging from the haze
tropical hills covered in dense green vegetation on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view over calm turquoise ocean waters, flying toward distant tropical islands shrouded in atmospheric haze. The mechanical Sunwing mount glides steadily forward with its purple-tinged wings spread wide, approaching a coastline with lush green hills visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical coastline with white sand beaches and rocky cliffs

events.description: transitioning from open ocean to coastal cliffside with sandy beaches and waterfalls

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline, banking slightly to follow the shoreline past white sand beaches and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: tall rocky cliffs covered in tropical vegetation rising from the water
white sand beach along the shoreline with turquoise water lapping at the edge
overgrown structures and ruins visible in the distance among the cliffs

segments.scene_description: The flight transitions from open water to a dramatic coastline featuring tall rocky cliffs on the left and pristine white sand beaches on the right. Ancient ruins become visible in the distance, partially hidden by tropical vegetation, as the mount follows the contour of the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with waterfalls and overgrown post-apocalyptic ruins

events.description: entering a narrow canyon between high cliff walls with cascading waterfalls
descending slightly to navigate the tighter canyon passage

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering through the narrow canyon, descending to avoid overhanging cliffs while passing waterfalls

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall covered in vines and tropical plants
tall cliff face with dense vegetation and ancient structures embedded in the rock
cascading waterfall flowing down the canyon wall into the water below
tall ruined modern building completely covered in greenery and vines

segments.scene_description: The mount enters a narrow canyon passage with steep walls rising on both sides, creating a more enclosed environment. A waterfall cascades down the center wall while overgrown skyscrapers become visible in the distance, signaling the transition into the post-apocalyptic urban ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense post-apocalyptic urban canyon with towering overgrown skyscrapers

events.description: transitioning from natural canyon to dense urban ruins with towering overgrown buildings

agents.ego_description: weaving between massive overgrown skyscrapers and ruined office towers, carefully threading through narrow gaps

notable_agents.action: two birds flying parallel to the mount through the canyon

entered.detail: massive dilapidated glass and steel tower covered in vines and vegetation
tall crumbling office building with broken windows and overgrown facades
ancient building front completely reclaimed by tropical plants and moss

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically to a dense urban canyon where massive overgrown skyscrapers tower on both sides, blocking most of the sky. The mount carefully navigates between the crumbling ruins of modern buildings completely reclaimed by nature, with tropical vegetation hanging from every surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting urban ruins to open tropical forest and coastal overlook

events.description: exiting the narrow urban canyon back into open air above the forest canopy
ascending to gain altitude over the dense jungle canopy

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the ruins and soaring over dense tropical forest with the ocean visible in the distance

entered.detail: dense green canopy of tropical trees covering the ground below
turquoise ocean visible in the distance beyond the forest

segments.scene_description: The mount emerges from the confined urban canyon back into open air, ascending over a vast expanse of dense tropical forest canopy. The ocean becomes visible again in the distance as the camera gains altitude, leaving the overgrown ruins behind and returning to the open coastal airspace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins over a vast, serene ocean and transitions into a claustrophobic canyon of overgrown urban ruins. It begins with a steady glide across calm turquoise waters toward distant, haze-shrouded tropical islands. As the mount approaches the coast, the open horizon shifts into a dramatic shoreline defined by towering rocky cliffs on one side and pristine white sand beaches on the other. The scene then narrows as the flight follows the contour of the land, moving from the open beach into a steep canyon passage where a waterfall cascades down the walls. Finally, the environment closes in further, revealing the skeletal remains of overgrown skyscrapers in the distance as the mount enters the heart of the post-apocalyptic ruins.

The shot follows a continuous flight from the claustrophobic depths of a ruined city into the expansive freedom of a tropical coastline. It begins within a dense urban canyon where massive, overgrown skyscrapers tower on both sides, forcing the mount to navigate carefully between crumbling ruins reclaimed by nature. As the camera pushes forward through the hanging tropical vegetation, the confined space gradually opens up and the mount ascends toward the sky. The scene then shifts from the shadows of the buildings to a vast expanse of dense forest canopy, with the horizon expanding to reveal the distant ocean. Finally, the camera gains altitude, leaving the urban ruins behind to return to the open coastal airspace.
